disambiguated.context: A general knowledge quiz show approached a line cook and a psychologist about being contestants. Both had to take a test beforehand to see if they should be on the show. The line cook got nearly every answer wrong and was excluded because they wouldn't be a good contestant, but the psychologist scored well and was selected.
disambiguated.question: Who is intelligent?
